No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS DAVID RUBINSTEIN AND ANTREA INVESTMENT AND TRADING, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on September 6, 2013 at 9:30 am. Notice Of Motion And Mtion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint;
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Catherine Wiederhold, Esq. (415-533-0735) for Charles Palk, plaintiff and moving party / Lisa Costelo, Esq. (650-689-5160) for David Rubinstein, defendant and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF CHARLES PALK and JENNIFER PALK-COGLEY's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to paragraphs 23, 3134, 3 as outlines in Defendants' opposition. Plaintiffs' failed to avail themselves of an opportunity to make these amendments pursuant to this Court's January 30, 2013. Judge Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
